result: The R script has been executed successfully. The cleaned and preprocessed data has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The script loaded all the input files, merged them using full_join by the NSID variable, harmonized the economic activity variables across different waves, standardized missing value codes, and created both harmonized and detailed adult versions of the variables. The final dataset includes the NSID and the economic activity variables for ages 17, 18, 19, 20, 25, and 32, along with the detailed adult versions for ages 25 and 32.
